name: Supabase Database Record to Slack Channel Alert
description: Monitors Supabase table insertions (e.g. new users, new orders) and broadcasts real-time alerts to a Slack channel.
plainEnglishSummary: Monitors your Supabase database table for newly inserted records.
Formats record details into a Slack block card.
Posts the update directly into your team's Slack channel.

requiredUserInputs.label: Supabase Table Name
requiredUserInputs.setupGuide: Enter the table name in Supabase (e.g., users, orders, feedback).

requiredUserInputs.label: Slack Channel
requiredUserInputs.setupGuide: Enter the channel name where alerts should be posted (e.g. #sales or #dev-logs).

params.message: New record created in Supabase database!
